data.en: I am going to fly out tomorrow.
data.cn: 我明天就要飞走了。
data.hint: 'be going to' for intentions / 'be going to' 表示打算
accept: Tomorrow I am going to fly out.

data.en: We aren't going to be in Dubai too long.
data.cn: 我们在迪拜不会待太久。
data.hint: Negative form of 'be going to' / 'be going to' 的否定式

data.en: I am certainly not going to get bored.
data.cn: 我肯定不会感到无聊。
data.hint: Adverb placement / 副词的位置
accept: Certainly I am not going to get bored.

data.en: What are you going to do there?
data.cn: 你打算在那里做什么？
data.hint: Question form / 疑问句形式

data.en: He is going to work for a diamond company.
data.cn: 他要去一家钻石公司工作。
data.hint: Third person singular / 第三人称单数用 'is'

data.en: They are going to build a really big ice castle.
data.cn: 他们要建一座非常大的冰雪城堡。
data.hint: Plural subject / 复数主语用 'are'

data.en: I am definitely going to that festival.
data.cn: 我一定会去那个节日的。
data.hint: Adverb of certainty / 表确定的副词

data.en: We are going to study at the high school.
data.cn: 我们要在高中的学校学习。
data.hint: Preposition 'at' for specific places / 具体地点前用介词 'at'

data.en: I am going to do some acting there for sure.
data.cn: 我肯定要在那里做些表演。
data.hint: do some acting / 做些表演
accept: For sure I am going to do some acting there.

data.en: I am not going to stop writing my blog.
data.cn: 我不会停止写我的博客。
data.hint: stop doing sth. / 停止做某事

data.en: What are you doing tonight?
data.cn: 你今晚要做什么？
data.hint: Present continuous for future / 现在进行时表将来

data.en: I am having dinner with my dad.
data.cn: 我要和爸爸一起吃晚饭。
data.hint: Present continuous for arrangement / 现在进行时表安排

data.en: We are going to an Italian restaurant.
data.cn: 我们要去一家意大利餐厅。
data.hint: 'an' before vowel sound / 元音前用 'an'

data.en: She is meeting me at the sports centre at two.
data.cn: 她两点在体育中心和我见面。
data.hint: Preposition 'at' for time and place / 时间和地点前用 'at'

data.en: I am going to a party with my sister.
data.cn: 我要和妹妹去参加派对。
data.hint: Present continuous / 现在进行时

data.en: Would you like to go to the cinema with me?
data.cn: 你想和我一起去电影院吗？
data.hint: Inviting expression / 邀请表达

data.en: There is a new shopping mall in the high street.
data.cn: 大街上有一家新的购物中心。
data.hint: 'There be' structure / 'There be' 句型

data.en: My uncle and aunt are visiting us on Sunday.
data.cn: 我的叔叔和阿姨星期天要拜访我们。
data.hint: Plural subject takes 'are' / 复数主语用 'are'

data.en: I don't suppose you want to go to the burger bar?
data.cn: 我想你大概不想去汉堡店吧？
data.hint: I don't suppose / 我想大概不

data.en: Are you going on a trip next week?
data.cn: 你下周要去旅行吗？
data.hint: Present continuous question / 现在进行时的疑问句

data.en: Our town looks a mess and that is not good.
data.cn: 我们的镇子看起来一团糟，这可不好。
data.hint: look + noun / 看起来像...

data.en: We need to educate people quickly.
data.cn: 我们需要迅速教育人们。
data.hint: Adverb modifies verb / 副词修饰动词

data.en: We also need to punish people who drop litter.
data.cn: 我们也需要惩罚乱扔垃圾的人。
data.hint: Relative clause 'who...' / 定语从句 'who...'

data.en: They don't like us hanging out in the shopping centre.
data.cn: 他们不喜欢我们在购物中心闲逛。
data.hint: hang out / 闲逛

data.en: We need more things for young people to do.
data.cn: 我们需要为年轻人提供更多可做的事情。
data.hint: for sb to do sth / 为某人做某事

data.en: There are too many cars on our roads.
data.cn: 我们的路上有太多汽车了。
data.hint: too many + plural noun / too many + 可数名词复数

data.en: The drivers don't care about the pedestrians.
data.cn: 司机们不在乎行人。
data.hint: care about / 在乎

data.en: We can stop this problem easily.
data.cn: 我们可以轻松解决这个问题。
data.hint: Adverb form of 'easy' / 'easy' 的副词形式

data.en: Some of these people paint really well.
data.cn: 其中一些人画得真好。
data.hint: Irregular adverb of 'good' / 'good' 的不规则副词形式

data.en: Don't drop your paper on the floor.
data.cn: 不要把纸扔在地上。
data.hint: Imperative sentence / 祈使句

data.en: What happens when they don't want to live in them?
data.cn: 当他们不想住在里面时会发生什么？
data.hint: Question word 'what' / 疑问词 'what'

data.en: They built the town with the money from the diamonds.
data.cn: 他们用钻石换来的钱建了这座镇子。
data.hint: Past tense 'built' / 过去式 'built'

data.en: These days visitors only see empty buildings and sand.
data.cn: 如今游客只看到空荡荡的建筑和沙子。
data.hint: Present simple for facts / 一般现在时表事实

data.en: The buildings didn't look like normal houses.
data.cn: 这些建筑看起来不像普通的房子。
data.hint: Negative past tense / 一般过去时的否定式

data.en: They stopped building the houses because there wasn't enough money.
data.cn: 他们停止了建房，因为没有足够的钱。
data.hint: stop doing sth / 停止做某事

data.en: No one can visit this city today.
data.cn: 今天没有人能参观这座城市。
data.hint: No one as subject / No one 作主语

data.en: He decided to build a big factory there.
data.cn: 他决定在那里建一个大工厂。
data.hint: decide to do sth / 决定做某事

data.en: It became too dangerous to live there.
data.cn: 住在那里变得太危险了。
data.hint: become + adj / become + 形容词

data.en: Everyone had to leave the town.
data.cn: 每个人都不得不离开这个镇子。
data.hint: Past tense of 'have to' / 'have to' 的过去式

data.en: They spent millions of dollars trying to stop it.
data.cn: 他们花了数百万美元试图阻止它。
data.hint: spend time/money doing sth / 花费时间/金钱做某事

data.en: I hope you aren't studying too hard.
data.cn: 我希望你没有学得太辛苦。
data.hint: Adverb 'hard' / 副词 'hard'

data.en: I am writing because I have got some really cool news.
data.cn: 我写信是因为我有一些非常酷的消息。
data.hint: Present continuous / 现在进行时

data.en: You won't believe it.
data.cn: 你绝对不会相信。
data.hint: won't = will not / won't 是 will not 的缩写

data.en: Mum and Dad are taking me to Sydney for the summer.
data.cn: 爸爸妈妈要带我去悉尼过暑假。
data.hint: Present continuous for arrangement / 现在进行时表安排

data.en: I am definitely going to hang out on the beach.
data.cn: 我肯定要去海滩上闲逛。
data.hint: Adverb of certainty / 表确定的副词

data.en: Guess what? Mum is going to buy me some surfing lessons.
data.cn: 猜猜看？妈妈要给我买一些冲浪课。
data.hint: Guess what? / 猜猜看？

data.en: We are going to be there for the whole of August.
data.cn: 我们要在那儿待整个八月。
data.hint: for the whole of / 整个...

data.en: I think the winter there is hotter than our summer.
data.cn: 我认为那里的冬天比我们的夏天热。
data.hint: Comparative / 比较级

data.en: By the way, Dad says we are going to be in Bangor next weekend.
data.cn: 顺便说一下，爸爸说我们下周末会在班戈。
data.hint: By the way / 顺便说一下

data.en: Is there any chance we can meet up?
data.cn: 我们有可能见个面吗？
data.hint: Is there any chance...? / 有可能...吗？
